full_text:
Bi Gui (Zhaoxian) 畢軌 (昭先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bi Gui (畢軌), styledZhaoxian (昭先), was born in Dongping. Officer of Cao Shuang’s faction, executed by Sima Yi after Sima Yi’s coup. Bi Gui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Bi Gui lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
One of Cao Shuang’s most trusted companions and confidants, he was made Commander of Capital District when Cao Shuang’s faction took over Wei. Was arrested when Sima Yi’s faction took over and executed after confession to treason against the Wei empire.
